enumDescriptions: Use the sibling Maven project if its shaded jar exists, otherwise fall back to the jar bundled with the extension.
Always use the jar bundled with the extension (server/java-ls.jar).
Always use the shaded jar from the sibling Maven project at 'javals.devProjectPath'.
javals.serverMode.description: Which JavaLS server jar to launch.

javals.devProjectPath.description: Path to the sibling java-ls Maven project, used when serverMode is 'dev' or 'auto'. Relative paths are resolved against the extension's parent directory.

javals.javaHome.description: Absolute path to a Java 17+ installation. If empty, JAVA_HOME and then PATH are consulted.

javals.jvmArgs.description: Extra JVM arguments appended after the required --add-exports/--add-opens flags.

javals.trace.server.description: Traces the communication between VS Code and the JavaLS server.

scripts.vscode:prepublish: npm run sync-server && npm run package
scripts.compile: npm run check-types && npm run lint && node esbuild.js
scripts.package: npm run check-types && npm run lint && node esbuild.js --production
scripts.pretest: npm run compile-tests && npm run compile && npm run lint
